bio: Innovative mechanical engineer specializing in robotics and autonomous systems. Passionate about designing efficient hardware solutions and integrating intelligent control systems for real-world applications.
name: Ethan Cole Ramirez
title: Robotics Engineer & Systems Designer

projects.title: Autonomous Navigation Rover
projects.description: A self-navigating ground rover capable of obstacle detection and path planning using LiDAR and computer vision.

projects.title: Smart Greenhouse System
projects.description: An automated greenhouse that monitors humidity, temperature, and soil moisture to optimize plant growth conditions.

projects.title: Drone Stabilization Controller
projects.description: Designed and simulated a PID-based control system to stabilize quadcopter flight under varying conditions.

community.description: Led robotics workshops for high school students, introducing them to basic electronics and programming.
Mentored undergraduate engineering students on capstone design projects and prototyping techniques.

education.description: Focused on robotics, automation, and advanced control systems.
achievements: Published thesis on adaptive control systems

education.description: Strong foundation in mechanical design, thermodynamics, and materials science.

highlights: Designed navigation algorithms for autonomous delivery robots.
Improved obstacle detection accuracy by 25% using sensor fusion.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams on hardware-software integration.
experience.description: Developing and optimizing robotic systems for real-world deployment in urban environments.

highlights: Created 3D models and prototypes for industrial components.
Assisted in testing mechanical systems under stress conditions.
Documented engineering processes and technical reports.
experience.description: Supported the design and testing of mechanical components in a fast-paced engineering team.

highlights: Simulated robotic arm dynamics and control strategies.
Analyzed system stability under variable loads.
Co-authored a conference paper on robotic precision control.
experience.description: Conducted research on improving accuracy and responsiveness of robotic manipulators.

sloganHeroSection: Engineering intelligent machines for a smarter, automated future.
